title: 奇跡を起こせ！伝説の熱血エール！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
City! Today's the big day, right? You're filming
today, right?! Are you all set?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm kinda on a whatever-happens-happens vibe...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Every omelet I've made so far has come out burnt
to a crisp, but... miracles do happen, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Say no more! This is where I come in! Gimme
a sec to get ready!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Get ready for what? ...Why does she have to get ready?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through the central plaza after class
when Bamboo Memory runs up to me out of
nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You're the trainer that helped with City's omelets,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If you're not busy, could you do me another
solid?! I need all hands on deck!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No hesitation, that's fire! I owe you one! Actually,
we'll be working as a team this time!

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's head to the studio. I hear your fans
are already there!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(Even though I said whatever happens happens,
my legs feel heavy...)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(How can I be this scared even after all the help I
got from Bamboo?)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: CITYYYY! WAAAIIIT!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what is it?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ready, everybody?! Fill up those lungs and give a
big shout for City!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Okay, just like we practiced!
READY?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: LEEEET'S GO!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: C-I-T-Y! What does that spell?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: FLUFFY! STEAMY! HOT AND CREAMY!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: NICE AND DREAMY!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What the—this is what you went to get ready?!
You're causing a scene! People can see us!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm supporting you! This is what I set out to do from the start!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You need to remember what you set out to do
too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Why'd you decide to go on this cooking show in
the first place? What is it you were trying to
communicate? What did you want your fans to
see?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Think back and remember what it was!

text_block_list.name: Assistant Director
text_block_list.text: Here we go! Cameras rolling in five, four, three...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: (What was it I set out to do? Why did I decide to go on this show?)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh... That's right. I wanted to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, the episode of the cooking show
with Gold City airs today.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
So, Gold City. How do you feel about the dish
you put together today?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It came out as burnt as always, and the taste was
something! But... I think I did pretty good for me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I didn't get any eggshells in it this time. ...Which
all goes to show that as long as you keep trying,
you'll see results!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
To me, cooking and racing are one in the same. If
I was able to show my best to the fans who are
always cheering me on, then I'm happy.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Also... I should mention a certain someone who
went above and beyond to support me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
She's my roommate, so I see her every day, but
still, I owe her a really big thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City successfully demonstrates how hard she
works and the show turns out great! And then...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: WHOOOA!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That was the BEST! SHOW! EVEEER! You
definitely let your fans know how you feel!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That cheer squad in front of the academy gates...
was literally one of the most embarrassing things
ever! But you helped me remember something
important.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! City, your sizzling hot passion is heating up
my heart!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I need to do something with these emotions! I
need to get fired up and blast off!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Got it! I'm gonna dash away into the setting sun!
I'm off in T-minus one minute!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh. There you go again... You know it's only noon, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Still, I suppose you only get to be young once. I'll
blast off with you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay, it's settled! We're doing a hundred laps
around the training course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bing, bong, ding, dong! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory, please come to the student
council office immediately concerning the recent
commotion in front of the academy.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! Was my support too hot?!
